title: Claude Code Skill Frontmatter
description: Schema for SKILL.md YAML frontmatter. Based on https://code.claude.com/docs/en/skills.md

name.description: Skill identifier (lowercase letters, numbers, hyphens only)

description.description: Brief description of what the skill does and when to use it

argument-hint.description: Hint shown during autocomplete to indicate expected arguments (e.g., '[issue-number]')

disable-model-invocation.description: Set to true to prevent Claude from automatically loading this skill. Default: false

user-invocable.description: Set to false to hide from the / menu. Default: true

oneOf.description: Comma-separated list of allowed tools (e.g., 'Read, Grep, Glob')

allowed-tools.description: Tools Claude can use without asking permission when this skill is active

model.description: Model to use when this skill is active

context.description: Set to 'fork' to run in a forked subagent context

agent.description: Which subagent type to use when context: fork is set (e.g., 'Explore', 'Plan', 'general-purpose')

hooks.description: Hooks scoped to this skill's lifecycle
